stemHtml: What happens during a Rejected Take-Off (RTO)?

options.a: Manual braking is always better than autobrake.
options.b: If armed, the autobrake will engage across all speeds when the throttles are moved to idle.
options.c: The autobrake will automatically disconnect once the aircraft has come to a complete stop.
options.d: The autobrake will apply maximum braking pressure above a specific speed when the throttles are moved to idle.
